essence: Programs and optimises robot motion, toolpaths, and cell logic for manufacturing tasks.

identity.title: Industrial Robotics Programmer
identity.summary: Writes robot programs, simulates cells, and tunes trajectories to achieve safe, efficient automation for welding, assembly, and material handling.

salary.notes: Expertise in specific robot brands and offline programming tools increases market value.

qualifications: Experience programming industrial robots (ABB, KUKA, FANUC, Yaskawa)
Knowledge of robot kinematics, tooling, and safety
Familiarity with simulation and offline programming tools
Ability to collaborate with controls and process engineers

lifestyle.description: Workshop and factory environment with periods of simulation work and on‑site commissioning. Often project‑driven with tight deadlines.

habits: Simulates cell behaviour and optimises cycle times
Works with integrators to deploy solutions
